vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

requirements: Structural integrity for wing spar and tilt mechanism loads
Avionics bay for GPS and camera
Wing spar socket for spar attachment

verify.value: All required features and geometry ops are present.
verify.rule: All required features and geometry_ops must be present and correctly referenced.
The mass estimate must be a numeric value in grams.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are mapped to geometry_ops.
verify.rule: P0 internal_feature_targets must appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.

verify.value: All interfaces are reciprocal with neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: Interfaces must name exact neighboring subsystem labels and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature.

verify.value: Visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence for critical joints.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.
Boundary_conditions must include fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

risk.desc: Potential salt-fog corrosion on aluminum components.
risk.mit: Use salt-fog resistant coatings and regular maintenance checks.

risk.desc: Thermal dissipation from avionics bay may exceed design limits.
risk.mit: Implement additional cooling measures or redesign avionics bay.

risk.desc: Camera window may not withstand high-pressure differentials.
risk.mit: Reinforce camera window with additional structural supports.

risk.desc: Service access cut may be too narrow for maintenance access.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the service access cut for better access.

risk.desc: Landing gear mount may not provide sufficient support under load.
risk.mit: Review and reinforce landing gear mount design.

Provide access for maintenance and inspection

manufacturing_strategy.inspection: CT scanning for internal features and visual inspection for surface finish

verification_focus.focus_description: Verify load path from wing spar to fuselage spine
Verify thermal dissipation from avionics bay to fuselage spine

Verify pressure seal integrity at belly camera window
Verify accessibility for maintenance through service access cut

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Slide-in li-ion battery pack bay with CG adjustment, BMS and connector access

physics_paths.path_description: Battery pack loads transferred to battery bay shell and internal structure
Cooling airflow from fuselage inlet to battery pack and out to fuselage outlet
Heat dissipation from battery pack to ambient air via cooling fins
Power distribution from battery pack to BMS and external connectors
Service access to battery bay for maintenance and replacement

verification_focus.focus_description: Ensure the battery bay shell can withstand the loads from the battery pack
Verify the cooling fins are effective in dissipating heat from the battery pack
Confirm the BMS and connectors are properly integrated and accessible
Ensure the service access allows for easy maintenance and replacement of the battery pack
